🌱 **Fertilizer Schedule — Wheat (Madhya Pradesh, Black soil)**

| Nutrient | Dose/acre | When |
|---|---|---|
| N (Urea) | 40 kg × 3 | Basal + 21 + 42 DAS |
| P (DAP) | 30 kg | Basal |
| K (MOP) | 40 kg | Basal |
| Zinc Sulphate | 5 kg | Once/season |

💰 Est. cost: ₹4420/acre
